en.name: Soyuz-TM STM-9 Gen.2 9x19 machine carbine
en.description: A modified version of the Soyuz-TM STM-9 Gen.2 9x19 carbine, originally designed for practical shooting competitions. The weapon features a reworked fire-control group capable of three-round burst and fully automatic fire, reinforced internal components, and a tuned operating system. The increased rate of fire improves its effectiveness at close range, but also places additional stress on the weapon's internal mechanisms.
